source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260520 우크라이나(Licarno) 23G, P1 - 이창민 팀장님/260527 1차 제출본/3.2 [Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector] Technical Document/A-TCF-5-157 Clinical Evaluation.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Technical Documentation section A-TCF-5-157 lists clinical evaluation-related documents and their revision metadata.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation by identifying the clinical evaluation plan, report, PMCF documents, literature study, and related appendices included under Clinical Evaluations.
keyPoints: Document No. A-TCF-5-157 is Rev. No. 6 with Rev. Date March 03, 2026.
The contents list includes Clinical Evaluation Plan A-TCF-5-117, Clinical Evaluation Report A-TCF-5-118, PMCF Plan A-PMCFP-5-001, and PMCF Evaluation Report A-PMCFEP-5-001.
The document is marked confidential and intended solely for the use of H&abyz Co., Ltd.
